title: Hermes Agent 5.0 (New Upgrades): HERMES BECAME ULTRA-HERMES!
summary: Hermes Agent 0.16 is a major release adding a native desktop app for macOS, Linux, and Windows, remote gateway support, improved web dashboard, fuzzy model search, slash undo for session steering, and enhanced security. The release aims to make the agent platform more accessible and practical across multiple surfaces.
